creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm not sure how you expect such a report to be handled; I do know, though,
that I won't be able to help.

Maybe it's an upstream issue, maybe it's FreeBSD-specific, maybe specific
to a certain environment, maybe it's even due to Wine being Wine and not
Windows? And it does not provide instructions on how to reproduce.

Maybe Damjan has an idea, but I cannot help close this.
